source_name: ABS Labour Force - energy and resources sector employment

fields.scope: ABS Labour Force Survey detailed quarterly tables by ANZSIC division, with quarterly persons-employed counts. Cross-reference Jobs and Skills Australia projections for forward look.
fields.primary_source_document: ABS Labour Force, Australia, Detailed (Cat. 6291.0.55.001) Table 04.
fields.keying_plan: Key persons-employed for each ANZSIC group, latest quarter and 5-year-prior. Note that some renewable installation jobs (rooftop solar installers) are classified under construction not energy; flag explicitly.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed persons-employed counts by ANZSIC. Coal mining employment is ~40-50k in Australia; oil and gas extraction ~25k; electricity supply ~70k. The transition risk picture concentrates in specific regions (Hunter Valley, Bowen Basin, La Trobe Valley).
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Labour Force, Australia, Detailed.
